description: Metadata-only Safetensors header admission (authorized by the live-composition/header-gate addendum): shard headers fetched via ranged reads (no tensor payloads, no full shard files) and reconciled against the pinned weight index. Aggregate-only: counts, booleans, and public architecture shapes; no tensor names, URLs, response headers, caches, or local paths.

prior_commit_reclassified.note: the earlier reported source-identity and tokenizer 'passes' were self-bound (expected derived from the same observed object/bytes) and are NOT established; only the live architecture-config and GPTQ-config checks are retained

independent_shape_evidence.note: obtained from real shard headers, independent of config and tokenizer; confirms vocab/output width 248320 and hidden 2048 and an untied 248320-wide head at the tensor level

remaining_blockers.corrected_non_self_bound_composition: source identity, text-only allow-list, and tokenizer expectations must be derived from INDEPENDENT provenance (pinned package/source, meta-device module enumeration, immutable tokenizer files) and compared to the observed runtime — not self-compared; special_token_behavior must be explicitly tested, not asserted
remaining_blockers.staging_orchestration_wiring: route remote enumeration/download/checksum/free-space/cleanup/resume/cache-isolation/final-reconciliation through the repaired run_staging_orchestration (the live probe used direct hf_hub_download)
remaining_blockers.final_overall_conjunction: one production path emitting a single conjunction with production-path integration tests that fail on self-binding
remaining_blockers.weight_staging: full shard payload staging remains prohibited until every independent prerequisite passes

privacy: aggregate-only; no tensor names, URLs, response headers, weights, caches, or local paths
